function.message: I could not safely complete the deletion request because only one project is identifiable from canonical records. I confirmed `40_projects/2026_04_27_repair_ledger/README.MD` (Repair Ledger), but I could not find a canonical project matching “attic rainwater rig.” No deletion was performed, and the inbox item was left in place.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox workflow and deletion workflow: treat inbox request as non-canonical, verify against canonical project READMEs, and do not delete when evidence is not uniquely supported.
function.outcome_justification: The request names two projects, but canonical project records only clearly support one (Repair Ledger). Repository-wide searches within `40_projects` for `attic`, `rainwater`, `water`, and `rig` returned zero matches, so selecting a second project would require guessing. Per deletion-and-wiping and inbox rules, this requires clarification and no mutation.
